declared.title: Uganda: Freedom on the Net 2024 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Freedom House's 2024 Uganda chapter. Coverage-contribution value against this corpus's Access Now entries: FH reports no new connectivity restrictions in this specific coverage window, which is itself informative alongside Access Now's own note of Uganda's continuing Facebook block -- a case where two orgs' accounts of the same period usefully diverge rather than duplicate, per the rubric's own reasoning on cross-org value. Publication month approximate.
